untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Identification of 'established support level' with unspecified lookback period [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]; (2) Detection of 'exhaustion signal' and 'single bar reversal' pattern which cannot be precisely expressed with allowed operators; (3) Real-time market reading and discretionary stop placement based on support breaks and fakeout recoveries are subjective skill-based elements not quantifiable with available indicators; (4) Multiple [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters lack concrete values. Used pivot s1 as proxy for support and bar properties for reversal pattern, but core signal intent requires experienced manual discretion.
translation_notes: Attempted structural translation using Pivot s1 as support level proxy, lower_wick > body as exhaustion/reversal pattern indicator, and close > prev_close as confirmation. However, the original signal explicitly states this requires 'considerable experience' and 'real-time market reading'—inherently subjective elements incompatible with mechanical rule engines. Stop loss and risk-reward parameters are undefined in original signal.
